title: dupatya intermedia
intro: Dupatya intermedia, also known as Tinospora cordifolia, is a climbing vine native to the tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Dupatya intermedia include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes and respiratory infections. Dupatya intermedia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and extracts, and is also used as a component in some traditional Ayurvedic medicines.
